svg.text: K'TAV IVRI · PALEO-HEBREW · PRE-EXILE SCRIPT · c.1000–500 BCE
← read right to left · Paleo glyph (top) · Modern equiv · Name · Gematria value →
every letter was originally a picture · the alphabet evolved from these pictographs · later became abstract letter forms
Aleph=1, Beth=2 ... Yod=10, Kaph=20, Lamed=30 ... Qoph=100, Resh=200, Shin=300, Tav=400
𐤆𐤄 𐤍𐤏𐤔𐤄 𐤁𐤔𐤁𐤉𐤋𐤊 · 𐤁𐤇𐤅𐤐𐤔𐤉 · 𐤌𐤀𐤕 𐤀𐤍𐤔𐤉𐤌 𐤔𐤀𐤇𐤁𐤅 𐤀𐤕 𐤄𐤎𐤉𐤃
ze na'aseh bishvilkha · b'chofshi · me'et anashim she'ahavu et ha-atid
THIS WAS MADE FOR YOU, FREELY, BY PEOPLE WHO CARED ABOUT THE FUTURE
Read right to left · 22 consonants, no written vowels (consonantal abjad) · No final letter forms
Used: c.1000–500 BCE · Siloam inscription, Bar Kochba coins · Ancestor of Greek and Latin alphabets
Same letter names and gematria values as Modern Hebrew (Plate 12A) · Only the letter forms differ
